name: great-authors
description: Twelve personas (eleven author voices including Toni Morrison, plus Robert Gottlieb the editor) + 17 slash commands for prose craft and editorial work, including the seven-phase autonomous-novel-orchestration pipeline. Drafted prose lands in manuscript/ on disk by default. Full project-bible management.

plugins.name: great-authors
plugins.description: Twelve personas (eleven author voices including Morrison, plus Gottlieb the editor) + 17 slash commands for writing craft, editorial work, and long-form project management with a living bible. Includes the seven-phase autonomous-novel-orchestration pipeline. For Claude Code.

plugins.name: great-authors-dxt
plugins.description: Same personas and commands as great-authors, packaged as a Claude Desktop extension. Build: cd distribution/dxt && npm install && npx @anthropic-ai/dxt pack
